[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101010 4
3 0100001 2
4 1111111 a
5 0001111 4
6 1111010 5
7 1110100 4

01 10 0100000 1
12 21 0100001 2 match 3
23 32 0001111 4 match 5
34 43 0001010 2
45 54 1110000 3
56 65 0100100 2
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 1100010 3

02 20 1101010 4 match 2
13 31 0000001 1
24 42 1111010 5 match 6
35 53 0000100 1
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 1100000 2
60 06 0100000 1
71 17 0100001 2 match 3

03 30 0001010 2
14 41 0100000 1

36 63 0000100 1
47 74 1100010 3
50 05 1100000 2
61 16 0100000 1
72 27 1100011 4

37 73 0000011 2
